reviews.comment:
Un 10 y me quedo corta! Excelente  atención,  super limpio. La señora de limpieza  un amor y super amable.
Dato importante  el agua caliente  es gratis.  Situación  que no se ve a menudo  en estos  tiempos.

(Translated by Google)
A 10 out of 10, and that's an understatement! Excellent service, super clean. The cleaning lady was lovely and incredibly kind.
Important detail: hot water is free. Something you don't see often these days.
